name: Rogue Cunning Action: Attack then Hide as Bonus Action
description: Tests Cunning Action (Rogue 2+): attack with main action, then Hide as a bonus action on the same turn. [1] Rogue shoots Goblin (main action — no advantage, no ally → no sneak attack). [2] Uses Cunning Action to Hide as bonus action (stealth 10 vs goblin passive perception 9 → always succeeds). [3] Goblin attacks the hidden Rogue on its turn (with disadvantage). [4] Being attacked does NOT remove the Hidden condition (5e 2024 rule: stealth breaks on YOUR attack, not incoming attack). [5] Round 2: Rogue attacks from Hidden (advantage → Sneak Attack 3d6 eligible). [6] After attacking, Hidden condition is removed.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as bonus action

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: 3d6 extra damage with advantage or ally adjacent to target

monsters.comment: Low passive perception (9) ensures stealth (min 1+10=11) always beats it. 30 HP to survive two hits for full scenario verification.
monsters.name: Goblin

input.text: I nock an arrow and prepare to strike

actions.comment: Main action: shoot the Goblin. No advantage and no ally adjacent → no Sneak Attack. Just 1d6+4 damage.

input.text: shoot the Goblin with my shortbow

actions.comment: Damage: 3 (1d6 weapon die) + 4 (DEX mod) = 7. Goblin HP: 30 → 23.
Bonus action: Cunning Action → Hide. Stealth bonus 10 vs goblin passive perception 9 → always succeeds (min roll 1+10=11 > 9). Rogue ducks behind cover.
After Cunning Action Hide, Rogue has the Hidden condition.
Goblin AI acts: moves toward Rogue (if needed) and attacks with DISADVANTAGE (Rogue is Hidden). Being attacked does NOT break Hidden — stealth only breaks when YOU attack.
After Goblin's attack on the hidden Rogue, Hidden condition MUST persist — incoming attacks do not reveal the Rogue's position in 5e 2024.
Round 2: Attack from Hidden → Rogue has Advantage (attacking from hidden). Advantage → Sneak Attack (3d6) is eligible even without an adjacent ally.

input.text: shoot the Goblin with my shortbow

actions.comment: Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit. Attacking from Hidden gives Advantage.
Damage roll: player submits sum of weapon die (1d6) + Sneak Attack dice (3d6) = 4d6 total. Total dice: 7. Server adds +4 modifier → 7+4=11 damage. Goblin HP: 23 → 12.
After attacking, Hidden condition MUST be removed. Attacking reveals the Rogue's position per 5e 2024 stealth rules.
